metadata.description: Flashie-AI plugins for Claude Code -- starting with Flash Vault setup, room for future Flash-internal tooling

plugins.name: flash-vault
plugins.description: Per-contributor setup for Flash Vault -- clones the private Flashie-AI/Flash-Vault repo to a path you choose, then generates personal/ files and a per-user CLAUDE.md so the AI loads Flash context calibrated to your role and product lines
